hypothesis_statement: Raising the Layer 2 absolute-momentum floor above the current `return_20d > 0` cutoff, while keeping the rest of the frozen stack unchanged, can lift out-of-sample average return per trade above zero without letting out-of-sample max drawdown stay above 35% under the same walk-forward and realism-cost policy.
why_this_hypothesis_first: Diagnosis terbaru memilih `path_1_hypothesis_refinement_first` dan menyimpulkan bahwa masalah utama ada pada kualitas edge strategi, bukan pada fondasi data, governance, atau realism-cost plumbing. Karena current frozen stack gagal terutama pada OOS robustness dan drawdown, perubahan pertama yang paling terisolasi adalah mengetatkan satu variabel kualitas entry di Layer 2 tanpa menyentuh regime, exit, sizing, atau cost model.

what_changes.proposed_hypothesis_change: replace the neutral floor with one stricter positive `return_20d` cutoff in the same field and units already used by the pipeline

what_stays_frozen: Layer 1 market regime filter stays exactly as the current frozen stack.
Layer 3 stays inactive / optional-off by default.
Time stop stays fixed at 12 days.
Position sizing stays 2% risk per trade and 10% max position cap.
Corporate-action ATR temporary policy stays unchanged.
No governance status changes are allowed.

minimum_pass_criteria.metric_basis: same walk-forward evaluation with the same realism-cost policy already documented

failure_conditions: Fail if out-of-sample average return per trade remains less than or equal to 0.0.
Fail if out-of-sample max drawdown remains greater than or equal to 35.0%.
Fail if holdout average return per trade stays below -0.1.
Fail if trade count falls below 350 in the evaluated window set.
Fail if holdout performance becomes worse than the current frozen stack after costs.
why_this_is_not_a_full_rebuild: Ini bukan full rebuild karena fondasi yang dipakai tetap sama: regime filter, exit logic, sizing, universe, walk-forward split, dan realism-cost policy semuanya dibekukan. Hipotesis ini hanya mengisolasi satu refinement kecil pada kualitas Layer 2 entry eligibility untuk menguji apakah edge OOS bisa diperbaiki tanpa memindahkan goalposts atau mengganti arsitektur utama.
